name: VibeVoice Realtime 0.5B
description: VibeVoice Realtime 0.5B — supports voice loading from files and multi-speaker dialogue via voice+text list pairs. Single default voice without reference files.
licenseNotes: VibeVoice released under community license. Check HuggingFace for latest terms.

metadata.searchDescription: VibeVoice realtime streaming conversational TTS 0.5B local mlx Apple Silicon natural speech

samples.label: Default
samples.transcript: Welcome to the future of voice synthesis running entirely on your local device.

modelCard.dataRetention: Local inference only — no data leaves device
knownLimitations: fp16 weights required — 4-bit and 8-bit quantized variants have weight shape mismatch
No voice selection — single default voice
Larger memory footprint than quantized models (~1GB RAM)
modelCard.notes: Runs locally via mlx-audio. Use ONLY the fp16 variant — 4-bit and 8-bit quants fail with "Expected shape (151936, 896) but received shape (151936, 112)" weight mismatch. Designed for real-time streaming output.
modelCard.hardwareRequirements: Apple Silicon Mac (M1+), ~1GB RAM for fp16
modelCard.voiceCloningMethod: voice file path or list of (voice, text) tuples for multi-speaker
modelCard.defaultVoiceNote: Default voice when no voice file provided; supports loading custom voice profiles from .wav/.npz files
